chunks.text: Tsu-Jae King Liu and Katherine Yelick elected to the NAE - EECS at Berkeley Prof. Tsu-Jae King Liu and Prof. Katherine Yelick have been elected to the National Academy of Engineers (NAE). Election to membership in the NAE is among the highest forms of recognition of notable accomplishments in engineering. Prof. King Liu was recognized for “contributions to the fin field effect transistor (FinFET) and its application to nanometer complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor (CMOS) technology,” and Prof. Yelick was recognized for “software innovation and leadership in high-performance computing.” Categories Faculty Honors Research View Open Faculty Positions
